title: greeting!
content:
ว่าแล้วเชียว  "ป้ากรุ้ง":http://gung.thaidiarist.com  ต้องมาบ่นแน่ ๆ เลย ... :P

a quick follow up from the previous entry, i'm now at chapter 16 (p. 330) on my harry potter reading - almost half-way through the book. so many characters, so many names to remember.

and that should be a good reason  %(me)or excuse .. eieie%  why there's no new entry here at all. i haven't read any news, i haven't been out of my room as much  %(me)except for hunting for food and not that i do go out much :P%  and i haven't watched tv.

so, dear readers, don't be surprised to see this entry for a couple days. i'm busy reading! :)
